allow:
Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/original_index.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

pattern = re.compile\(r'<script\(?!\\s+src\)>\(.*?\)</script>', re.DOTALL\)
matches = pattern.findall\(content\)

# Block 0: theme-init → stays inline in HTML \(head\)
# Blocks 1,2,3,4: go into main.js
main_js_blocks = matches[1:]  # blocks 1-4

with open\('/Users/yamashita.jun.kk/Antigravity/TobaBuzzPR/presentation/main.js', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for block in main_js_blocks:
        f.write\(block.strip\(\)\)
        f.write\('\\n\\n'\)

print\(f"main.js written with {len\(main_js_blocks\)} blocks"\)
print\(f"Total chars: {sum\(len\(b\) for b in main_js_blocks\)}"\)
EOF)
